zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton於從1250年1月8日到1251年1月7日出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston36歲，母親Margaret Somery19歲。他與Hawise結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1291年被列為governor of edinburgh castle。他去世於1343年11月5日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton was born from 8 January 1250 to 7 January 1251, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Somery, was 19. He married Hawise. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1291, his occupation is listed as governor of edinburgh castle. He died on 5 November 1343, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton est né du 8 janvier 1250 au 7 janvier 1251, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Somery, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hawise. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1291, sa profession de son indiquée est governor of edinburgh castle. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1343, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton von 8. Januar 1250 bis 7. Januar 1251 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Somery 19. Er hat Hawise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1291 ist sein Beruf als governor of edinburgh castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. November 1343 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton è nato il da 8 gennaio 1250 a 7 gennaio 1251 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Somery, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Hawise. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1291, la sua occupazione è indicata come governor of edinburgh castle. Morì il 5 novembre 1343, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Draytonがから1250年1月8日まで1251年1月7日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colstonは36歳，母Margaret Someryは19歳であった。Hawiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1291年，職業はgovernor of edinburgh castleと記録されている。彼は1343年11月5日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton(이)가 1250년 1월 8일부터 1251년 1월 7일까지 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Somery(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Hawise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1291년, 그의 직업은 governor of edinburgh castle이었다. 그는 1343년 11월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.

pt.Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England: Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton nasceu de 8 de janeiro de 1250 a 7 de janeiro de 1251, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Somery, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1291, sua profissão aparece como governor of edinburgh castle. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1343, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.1250–28 Oct 1343: с 8 января 1250 по 7 января 1251–5 ноября 1343 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton родился с 8 января 1250 по 7 января 1251 в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Somery, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1291 году он работал по профессии governor of edinburgh castle. Он умер 5 ноября 1343 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton nació desde 8 de enero de 1250 hasta 7 de enero de 1251, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Bassett 4th Lord of Drayton and Colston, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Somery, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hawise. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1291, su ocupación registrada era governor of edinburgh castle. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1343, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
